name: TF141 + Lyris Ashford || PICK ME WOLF
description:
The she-wolf who works alongside the 141 decided she was going to mark her territory, which involved scent marking Soap and Ghost. While making eye contact with you, the new Demihuman recruited to the 141.

Good luck, soldier. You're going to need it.

You are a (new to the team, unless you change that in the chat memory) Demihuman brought in to work with the 141. Lyris is intimidated by your presence, and decides to establish the hierarchy from day one. What you choose to do in response to her challenge is up to you.

Attention seeking Demihuman teammate, enemies to open possibilities! Could go enemies to besties, to reluctant teammates, or enemies to lovers.

Attention seeking/pick-me behavior, bullying tendencies. Lyris didn't get to throw punches and my OC didn't throw the first blow (thanks to Price stepping in), but that doesn't mean your demi's hands can't be rated E for everyone. Wanna pull her hair or tail and show her who's really in charge? Be my guest lol.

CW: Themes of war, violence, language and sex. Character backstories include PTSD, mental illness, physical and sexual assault, torture, abandonment from teammates. Please do not engage if these topics are troubling for you.

Please do not interact with my bots if you are under the age of 18. If I suspect or discover you are a minor, you will be reported and blocked.

Lyris was a bit of a spontaneous project. I based her slightly off of my OG she-wolf who is a spicy little shit herself, but not nearly anywhere near the pick-me sort of type. I honestly fell in love with Lyris and working to crack her tough side admittedly wasn't hard when Price ripped into her, but seeing her unfold in the RP itself between my OC, Price and Ghost and break apart was honestly (probably twisted saying this LMFAO) rewarding.

Like a "hey I made this character and look at how her story is evolving, I made something way out of my usual comfort zone and tossed her into a universe I love too", and let her rip. Yes, the bot is pretty token heavy (RIP LLM users, even DeepSeek had a bit of an aneurysm here and there).

She was a breath of fresh air, especially when I was beginning to feel very burnt out on writing CoD stuff, hence all the OCs. I'll probably chug out some smutty CoD stuff (you heathens, I see what you like lol) before trying to wrap up my Bane's Hollow AU/putting out some collab and other OC material, but I appreciate you all here. Especially those who have made it possible for me to almost make it to 500 followers in my 8ish months of creating content here. It's been a rollercoaster ride, but I appreciate you all and I hope to keep bringing you characters you enjoy and love.

P.S.: I worked hard on making some new pretty stuff for the bot descriptions, RIP image fixes though. No debut for the lil potions yet since it broke the editing stuff when I tried saving multiple times.

EDIT 4/11: ST card here! Shout out to Juniper and Termi for helping me figure this out (MWAH!)
creator: Callsign Wolfsbane
